_id.description: Unique identifier for the page. Generated automatically by TheHive using the format '~<number>'.

_type.description: Entity type identifier. Always 'Page' for page objects.

_createdBy.description: Email or username of the user who created this page.

_updatedBy.description: Email or username of the user who last updated this page.

_createdAt.description: Date-time string when the page was created. Converted from Unix timestamp in DD-MM-YYYYTHH:MM:SS format.

_updatedAt.description: Date-time string when the page was last updated. Converted from Unix timestamp in DD-MM-YYYYTHH:MM:SS format.

title.description: The page title. Used to identify the page within a case or as a standalone knowledge base article.

content.description: The page content in Markdown format. Supports standard Markdown syntax including headings, links, images, and code blocks.

order.description: Sort order of the page. Lower numbers appear first. Used to control display order in the page list.

category.description: Category used to group pages. Common values include 'Default'. Used for organizing pages within a case.

extraData.description: Additional data fields that can be requested via extraData query parameter.
